title: Homepage loads hero, stats, and tech stack content
description: Verifies the homepage displays its primary hero content along with stats and tech stack sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section with a heading and subtitle is displayed
Verify the stats grid and tech stack items are displayed

title: Homepage CTA navigates to Services page
description: Verifies the primary hero CTA can take the user from the homepage to the services page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action to view services
Verify the user lands on the services page and service package cards are displayed

title: Homepage contact link navigates to Contact page
description: Verifies the hero contact link navigates to the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to contact the team
Verify the user lands on the contact page and the contact form is displayed

title: Tech stack carousel is readable and stable after interaction
description: Verifies the tech stack section remains readable after basic user interaction (scroll) to mimic carousel engagement.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the tech stack section
Wait for the tech stack items to finish initial load
Verify multiple tech stack names are displayed and readable

title: Homepage loads correctly after viewport change
description: Verifies the homepage primary content remains available after resizing viewport (responsive stability).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a narrow mobile width
Scroll to the stats grid section
Verify the hero section and stats grid are displayed

title: Services page loads main service packages
description: Verifies the services page displays the three main service cards with pricing and features.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Verify the main service package cards are displayed
Verify pricing and feature details are visible for the main packages

title: Expand coming soon packages and view additional offerings
description: Verifies that expanding the coming-soon section reveals additional package cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the control to view all services
Verify additional package cards are displayed in the expanded section

title: Collapse coming soon packages to return to main packages only
description: Verifies that collapsing the coming-soon section hides the additional package cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the control to view all services
Click the control to hide the expanded services
Verify the additional package cards are not displayed and only the main packages remain visible

title: Select highlighted package navigates to Contact page
description: Verifies choosing the highlighted package routes the user to the contact page to request it.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the button to choose the highlighted package
Verify the user lands on the contact page and the contact form is displayed

title: Select non-highlighted package consult action navigates to Contact page
description: Verifies the consult action from a non-highlighted package routes the user to the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the button to request a free consultation for a non-highlighted package
Verify the user lands on the contact page and the contact form is displayed

title: Bottom CTA navigates to Contact page
description: Verifies the bottom services call-to-action navigates to the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Scroll to the bottom call-to-action section
Click the bottom call-to-action to contact for a free consultation
Verify the user lands on the contact page and the contact form is displayed

title: Contact page loads form and contact info cards
description: Verifies the contact page displays the contact form fields and contact information cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Verify the contact form fields for name, email, subject, and message are displayed
Verify contact information cards are displayed

title: Submit contact form with required fields missing shows validation error
description: Verifies client-side validation prevents submission when the email field is left blank.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill a name into the name field
Fill a subject into the subject field
Fill a message into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a validation error is visible indicating the email field is required

title: Invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies the form shows an email validation error when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill a name into the name field
Fill an invalid email into the email field
Fill a subject into the subject field
Fill a message into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify an email format validation error is visible

title: Contact form can be filled with valid inputs without errors shown
description: Verifies that entering valid values into all fields leaves the form in a ready-to-submit state without visible validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill "Test User" into the name field
Fill "test.user@example.com" into the email field
Fill "Project Inquiry" into the subject field
Fill "Hello, I would like to discuss a project." into the message field
Verify no validation errors are visible for the filled fields

title: Click contact email card triggers mail action
description: Verifies the email contact card is interactive via normal click behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Click the email contact card
Verify the browser attempts to open a mail action for the email address

title: Portfolio page loads and displays project cards
description: Verifies the portfolio gallery renders project cards with key metadata visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Verify project cards are displayed
Verify at least one project card shows a category badge and a tech stack badge

title: Open a live project link from a portfolio card
description: Verifies a live project link can be opened from a project card via normal click interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Click the live project link on a project card that is not marked as coming soon
Verify the browser navigates away from the portfolio site to an external destination

title: Navigate from Portfolio CTA to Contact page
description: Verifies the portfolio call-to-action routes the user to the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Click the call-to-action to start a project
Verify the user lands on the contact page
Verify the contact form is displayed

title: Placeholder project shows Coming Soon and does not navigate externally
description: Verifies non-live projects are marked as coming soon and do not provide an external navigation outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Scroll to find a project card marked as coming soon
Click the project link or visit action for that coming soon project
Verify the user remains on the portfolio page

title: Portfolio project cards show description content
description: Verifies portfolio cards include readable descriptive content for projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Scroll through the portfolio list
Verify multiple project cards display a project description

title: How We Work page loads and shows a 6-step timeline
description: Verifies the workflow timeline content is visible and complete.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-we-work
Scroll through the timeline section
Verify six numbered steps are displayed

title: How We Work CTA navigates to Contact page
description: Verifies the contact call-to-action from the process page routes to the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-we-work
Click the call-to-action to contact now
Verify the user lands on the contact page
Verify the contact form is displayed

title: Mission page loads and displays vision, mission, values, and quote
description: Verifies the mission page primary content is visible, including values grid and closing quote.

steps.description: Navigate to /mission
Scroll through the mission page content
Verify vision and mission content sections are displayed
Verify four core values cards are displayed

title: Mission page core values include expected value names
description: Verifies the four values shown include the specific value names defined by the product.

steps.description: Navigate to /mission
Scroll to the core values section
Verify the values Modernisasi Digital, Inovasi Teknologi, Pemberdayaan UMKM, and Kualitas Premium are displayed

title: Mission page closing quote is readable on the page
description: Verifies the closing quote section is present and visible to users.

steps.description: Navigate to /mission
Scroll to the bottom of the mission page
Verify a closing quote section is displayed

title: Navigate between pages using global nav links
description: Verifies the global navigation can take the user from the homepage to another primary route.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a top navigation link to go to the services page
Verify the user lands on the services page

title: Return to homepage by clicking the logo from another page
description: Verifies clicking the navbar logo returns the user to the homepage from a different route.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the site logo in the global navigation
Verify the user lands on the homepage

title: Multi-step navigation journey across several routes
description: Verifies the user can navigate across multiple pages using navbar links without direct URL entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a top navigation link to go to the portfolio page
Click a top navigation link to go to the how we work page
Click a top navigation link to go to the contact page
Verify the user lands on the contact page

title: Mobile hamburger menu toggles open and closed
description: Verifies the mobile navigation menu can be opened and then closed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Open the mobile hamburger menu
Close the mobile hamburger menu
Verify the mobile navigation menu is not expanded

title: Use mobile hamburger menu to navigate to another page
description: Verifies navigation works from within the mobile menu.

steps.description: Navigate to /mission
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Open the mobile hamburger menu
Click a navigation link in the mobile menu to go to the services page
Verify the user lands on the services page

title: Navbar is present and usable on secondary pages
description: Verifies the global navigation renders on a non-home route and enables moving to another route.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-we-work
Click a top navigation link to go to the mission page
Verify the user lands on the mission page

title: Footer internal link navigates to a page
description: Verifies clicking an internal footer link routes the user to the linked page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click a footer link that navigates to the services page
Verify the user lands on the services page

title: Footer internal link works from a non-home page
description: Verifies footer links function consistently across pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Scroll to the footer
Click a footer link that navigates to the contact page
Verify the user lands on the contact page

title: Footer social icon opens an external profile link (non-placeholder)
description: Verifies that a footer social icon navigates away to an external destination when it is not a placeholder.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click a footer social media icon that is not a placeholder link
Verify the browser navigates away from the site to an external page

title: Footer placeholder social icon does not provide external navigation
description: Verifies that clicking a placeholder social icon does not result in an external profile being opened.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Scroll to the footer
Click a footer social media icon that is a placeholder link
Verify the user remains on the contact page
